summary: ANDROID | Low battery notification shown on app cold start despite full battery
scenario: Low battery notification incorrectly appears on cold start when device battery level is high
description_clean: Low battery notification incorrectly appears on app cold start (first launch, no memory) even when the device battery level is high. Expected behavior: no low battery notification should be shown if the battery level is sufficient.
steps: Ensure the device battery level is high (e.g., > 50%).
Close the app completely (no memory, cold start).
Launch the app for the first time.
Observe whether a low battery notification appears.
expected: No low battery notification should be shown if the battery level is sufficient.
actual: Low battery notification incorrectly appears on app cold start even when the device battery level is high.
